name: Famous Brown Derby Red Velvet Cake and Icing
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together cake flour, salt, and instant cocoa mix.
2. Cream butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
3. Beat in eggs one at a time, then blend in red food coloring and vanilla extract.
4. Mix buttermilk, vinegar, and baking soda separately.
5. Add the dry ingredients alternately with the wet ingredients to the creamed mixture, blending gently between each addition.
6. Pour batter into prepared pans.
7. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes. Do not overbake.
Icing (never hardens):
4 tablespoons Flour
1 cup Sweet Milk
1 cup Sugar
1 teaspoon Margarine
1/2 cup Non-Liquid Shortening
3 teaspoons Vanilla Extract
1/4 teaspoon Salt
1. Blend flour and milk until smooth.
2. Cook the mixture until it thickens to a cream consistency and cools.
3. In a separate bowl, cream sugar, margarine, shortening, salt, and vanilla extract until light and fluffy.
4. Gradually fold in the slightly cooked flour mixture into the butter mixture until well combined and fluffy.
